items.title: Senescence Gene Expression Profiles and 90-Day Outcome in Stroke Patients.
items.abstract: Understanding the biological determinants of stroke outcome is essential to improve treatment strategies. Cellular senescence may contribute to vascular dysfunction with age and has been linked to poor outcomes across a range of diseases. However, the role of senescence on stroke outcome in patients is not well defined. We sought to investigate the relationship between enriched senescence-associated gene signature expression and functional outcome after stroke. Acute ischemic stroke patients and control participants were recruited from University of Alberta Hospital. Control (non-stroke) participants had stroke risk factors and were of similar age and sex to the stroke patients. Whole-blood gene expression was measured by microarray. Senescence signature expression was evaluated to quantify senescence enrichment by gene set enrichment analysis. Outcome was determined using the modified Rankin Scale (mRS) at 90 days after stroke onset. The relationship between senescence, age, risk factors, and stroke outcome was analyzed through ordinal logistic regression. We included 129 acute ischemic stroke patients ≥60 years old, with a mean age of 77.3 ± 9.9 years and 41.9% female, and 41 control participants, with a mean age of 76.5 ± 7.9 years and 56.1% female. Patients with poor outcome (mRS > 2) had enriched senescence gene expression compared with those with good outcome (mRS ≤ 2); control participants also showed significant differences in senescence enrichment compared with the stroke outcome groups. High senescence was associated with a shift toward worse mRS scores (OR: 2.32; 95% CI 1.05-5.97) adjusted for age, sex, stroke severity, and type 2 diabetes mellitus. Senescence increased with age with variability across different ages. Among the senescence-associated genes, most differentially expressed between outcome groups were the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) ligands amphiregulin and epiregulin, and the C-C motif chemokine ligand 16. Increased senescence was associated with worse stroke outcome. These findings suggest that blood cell senescence may contribute to vascular aging and worse stroke outcome, likely by altering epidermal growth factor receptor signaling, increasing inflammation and blood-brain barrier disruption. This study provides translational evidence that measuring senescence may reflect a biological aging process that influences functional outcome after stroke.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳卒中後の予後改善には、生物学的決定因子の理解が重要である。細胞老化は加齢に伴う血管機能障害に関与し、多様な疾患で予後不良と関連するが、脳卒中患者における影響は不明であった。  
方法：アルバータ大学病院で急性虚血性脳卒中患者（60歳以上129名）とリスク因子を持つ非脳卒中対照者（41名）を対象に、全血の遺伝子発現をマイクロアレイで測定。老化関連遺伝子群の発現を遺伝子セット濃縮解析で評価し、90日後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）による機能的予後と関連を解析した。  
結果：予後不良群（mRS＞2）は良好群（mRS≤2）より老化遺伝子発現が有意に高く、対照群とも差異が認められた。高い老化シグネチャは年齢、性別、脳卒中重症度、糖尿病を調整後も悪いmRSスコアと関連（オッズ比2.32）。特にEGFRリガンドのアムフィレグリン、エピレグリン、CCL16が差異を示した。  
結論：血液細胞の老化は血管老化やEGFRシグナル変化、炎症促進、血液脳関門障害を介して脳卒中予後悪化に寄与する可能性がある。老化遺伝子発現の測定は脳卒中後の生物学的老化過程を反映し、予後予測に有用な指標となり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、急性虚血性脳卒中患者の血液における細胞老化関連遺伝子の発現と90日後の機能的転帰（mRS）との関連を調査した。老化遺伝子発現の増加は、年齢や糖尿病などを調整しても悪い転帰（mRS＞2）と有意に関連し、特にEGFRリガンドのアムフィレグリンやエピレグリンの発現差が顕著であった。血液細胞の老化は血管老化や炎症、血液脳関門障害を介して脳卒中予後悪化に寄与すると示唆される。

items.title: Muscle MRI as an Imaging Biomarker of Muscle Damage in Patients With Spinal and Bulbar Muscular Atrophy.
items.abstract: Spinal and bulbar muscular atrophy (SBMA) is a rare neuromuscular disorder without effective treatments available. There is an unmet need to identify biomarkers reflecting underlying disease processes and sufficiently responsive to detect slow changes to enable future clinical trials. Muscle MRI is a responsive measure of muscle volume and fat content, a pathologic hallmark of SBMA that precedes functional changes. We therefore assessed muscle MRI as a potential imaging biomarker for detecting change in SBMA severity. This was a noninterventional, longitudinal study enrolling patients with confirmed SBMA diagnosis and evidence of muscle fat replacement. All patients were assessed by MRI and clinical measures at baseline and at 6-month intervals for up to 18 months. Whole-body Dixon MRI scans were analyzed using AMRA Researcher, assessing 19 muscle groups bilaterally and quantifying lean muscle volume (LMV), muscle fat fraction (MFF), and muscle fat infiltration (MFI). Rate of change was calculated for whole-body and regional muscle composite measures. Key clinical outcome measures included the Spinal Bulbar Muscular Atrophy Functional Rating Scale (SBMAFRS) and 2-minute walk test (2MWT). Correlation between muscle MRI measures and clinical assessments was calculated using Spearman correlation analysis, and responsiveness to change was evaluated using standardized response mean (SRM). We included 26 patients with a mean age of 57.6 ± 7.12 years (range:44-71 years), mean SBMAFRS 40.6 ± 3.85 (range:33-48), and a mean baseline 2MWT distance of 126.09 ± 39.83 m (range:39.0-194.0). The mean changes and (SRM) over 12 months in whole-body muscle MRI were LMV -4.38 ± 2.48% (-1.76), MFF 2.49 ± 1.38p.p. (1.81), and MFI 0.79 ± 0.51p.p. (1.55) ( Consistent and reproducible decreases in whole-body and regional muscle LMV composites over time and increases in MFF and MFI were observed across SBMA patients. Baseline MRI assessments reflect disease severity correlating with SBMAFRS and 2MWT functional measures. SRM of muscle MRI was higher than SRMs of functional measures, indicating that muscle MRI is a responsive biomarker that tracks disease progression and potentially treatment effects in future clinical trials.
items.summary_ja: 背景：脊髄性球脊髄筋萎縮症（SBMA）は治療法が確立されていない希少な神経筋疾患であり、病態を反映し緩やかな変化を検出可能なバイオマーカーの開発が求められている。方法：SBMA患者26名を対象に、筋肉の脂肪置換を伴う症例で非介入の縦断的研究を実施。全身Dixon MRIを用い、19筋群の筋肉量（LMV）、脂肪率（MFF）、脂肪浸潤（MFI）を定量化し、6か月ごとに最大18か月追跡。臨床評価はSBMA機能評価尺度（SBMAFRS）と2分間歩行テスト（2MWT）を用いた。結果：12か月間でLMVは平均-4.38％減少（SRM=-1.76）、MFFは2.49ポイント増加（SRM=1.81）、MFIは0.79ポイント増加（SRM=1.55）と、筋肉量減少と脂肪浸潤の進行が一貫して観察された。MRI指標はSBMAFRSおよび2MWTと有意に相関し、MRIの感度（SRM）は機能評価より高かった。結論：筋MRIはSBMAの病態進行を反映し、臨床試験における治療効果の評価に有用な感度の高いイメージングバイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 脊髄性球脊髄筋萎縮症（SBMA）患者26名を対象に、筋肉MRIを用いて筋萎縮と脂肪浸潤の進行を18ヶ月間追跡した。MRI指標は機能評価（SBMAFRS、2分間歩行距離）と相関し、筋肉量減少や脂肪増加が明確に検出された。MRIの感度は機能評価より高く、SBMAの病態進行や治療効果を評価する有望なバイオマーカーであることが示された。

items.title: A Predictive Model for Short-Term Mortality After Status Epilepticus: The ACARD Score.
items.abstract: Reliable prediction of short-term mortality in status epilepticus (SE) can contribute to guide clinical decisions. Current prognostic systems achieve only acceptable predictive power and show lack of generalizability or poor calibration. We aimed to identify clinical predictors of short-term mortality in patients with nonhypoxic SE and develop a predictive score. This was a multicenter, multinational cohort study based on registry data. Participants were consecutive episodes of SE in participants aged 14 years or older from Modena (Italy) (derivation cohort) and in participants aged 18 years or older from Salzburg (Austria) (validation cohort). The predefined outcome was 30-day mortality after the onset of SE. Age, sex, level of consciousness before treatment, semiology of SE, level of disability at baseline before SE, etiology, and treatment refractoriness were assessed. Adjusted regression coefficients of each independent predictor were transformed to produce a points-based risk scoring system. The Italian cohort included 689 episodes, and the Austrian cohort comprised 569 episodes of SE. In the derivation cohort, the 30-day mortality rate was 27.3%. The independent risk factors were aged 75 years or older (odds ratio [OR] 5.52, 95% CI 3.45-8.83;  The ACARD score is a user-friendly tool developed to predict 30-day mortality after nonhypoxic SE. It has the potential to identify participants at high risk of short-term mortality and outperform the performance of other available scoring systems.
items.summary_ja:
背景：てんかん重積状態（SE）における短期死亡率の信頼できる予測は、臨床判断の支援に重要であるが、既存の予測システムは予測精度や一般化可能性に課題がある。  
方法：イタリア・モデナの689例（14歳以上）を対象とした多施設多国籍コホート研究で予測モデルを作成し、オーストリア・ザルツブルクの569例（18歳以上）で検証した。30日死亡率をアウトカムとし、年齢、性別、治療前の意識レベル、SEの症状、基礎障害度、原因、治療抵抗性を評価。多変量回帰分析により独立予測因子を抽出し、点数化したリスクスコア（ACARDスコア）を開発。  
結果：導出コホートの30日死亡率は27.3％で、75歳以上（OR 5.52）などが独立したリスク因子であった。  
結論：ACARDスコアは非低酸素性SEの30日死亡率を予測する簡便なツールであり、既存のスコアより高精度に高リスク患者を特定可能である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、非低酸素性てんかん重積状態（SE）患者の30日間短期死亡率を予測するACARDスコアを開発した。イタリアとオーストリアの多施設コホートを用い、年齢75歳以上や意識レベル、発作型、基礎障害度、原因、治療抵抗性などを独立予測因子として特定。ACARDスコアは既存の予測モデルより高精度で、臨床判断の支援に有用である。

items.title: Functional Outcomes and Safety of Endovascular Thrombectomy in Pediatric Acute Ischemic Stroke With Cardiac Abnormalities.
items.abstract: Cardiac abnormalities are among the most common and complex risk factors of pediatric acute ischemic stroke (AIS). Although endovascular treatment (EVT) is increasingly used in children, uncertainty persists regarding its safety and effectiveness in patients with underlying cardiac disease, leading to therapeutic hesitation in this high-risk population. The aim of this study was to determine whether the association between EVT and functional outcomes after pediatric AIS differs according to cardiac abnormality status. This study was a retrospective secondary analysis of a prospective, multinational cohort registry (Save ChildS Pro). The registry enrolled patients between 2018 and 2023, with 90-day follow-up. Participants included children aged 28 days to 18 years with confirmed AIS due to large vessel occlusion and available 90-day Pediatric Stroke Outcome Measure (PSOM) scores. Cardiac abnormalities were defined as congenital or acquired cardiac disease documented by echocardiography or medical records. The primary outcome was poor functional outcome at 90 days, defined as PSOM score >0.5. Secondary outcomes included ordinal 90-day modified Rankin Scale (mRS) scores and longitudinal neurologic recovery assessed using the Pediatric NIH Stroke Scale (pedNIHSS). Treatment-subgroup interaction was assessed using penalized logistic regression. Of 208 eligible patients, 178 were included in the final analysis after excluding those with missing outcome data [43% female; mean age: 11.5 years]. Among 178 children, 56 (31.5%) had cardiac abnormalities. EVT was more frequently performed in children with cardiac abnormalities than in those without ( In this multinational pediatric AIS cohort, EVT was associated with improved functional outcomes and accelerated neurologic recovery, with no evidence that cardiac abnormality status modifies association of treatment with outcome or safety. These findings support consideration of EVT in children with cardiac abnormalities when clinically indicated. This study provides class IV evidence that endovascular therapy in pediatric patients with AIS is associated with improved functional outcome irrespective of underlying cardiac abnormality status.
items.summary_ja:
背景：小児急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）において、心臓異常は一般的かつ複雑なリスク因子である。心疾患を有する小児への血管内血栓除去術（EVT）の安全性と有効性は不明瞭であり、治療に躊躇が生じている。  
方法：2018～2023年に多国籍前向きコホート登録（Save ChildS Pro）から28日～18歳の大血管閉塞によるAIS患者178名（うち31.5％が心臓異常あり）を対象に、90日後の機能的転帰（PSOMスコア＞0.5）を評価。EVTの施行頻度と治療効果の心臓異常の有無による違いを後ろ向きに解析した。  
結果：心臓異常群ではEVT施行率が高く、EVTは全体で機能的転帰の改善と神経回復の促進に関連した。心臓異常の有無によってEVTの効果や安全性に有意な差は認められなかった。  
結論：小児AISにおいて、心臓異常の有無にかかわらずEVTは有効かつ安全であり、心疾患を持つ小児にも適応を検討すべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 小児急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）における心疾患は主要なリスク因子であるが、心疾患を有する患者への血管内血栓回収術（EVT）の安全性・有効性は不明瞭であった。本研究は多国籍前向きコホートの二次解析で、心疾患の有無にかかわらずEVTが90日後の機能的転帰改善および神経回復促進に寄与することを示した。心疾患患者に対してもEVTの適用が支持されるエビデンスを提供する。

items.title: Association Between Plasma GFAP and Medial Temporal Atrophy and Cognition in Amyloid-Negative Cerebrovascular Disease.
items.abstract: Plasma glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP), a marker of astrocyte reactivity, is elevated across multiple neurodegenerative conditions, including Alzheimer disease. However, its role in neurodegeneration and cognitive decline driven by cerebrovascular pathology, independent of β-amyloid (Aβ) copathology, remains poorly characterized. We investigated whether plasma GFAP is associated with medial temporal atrophy and cognition across a spectrum of cerebrovascular burden in Aβ-negative cognitively impaired individuals. In this cross-sectional multicenter study, Aβ PET-negative cognitively impaired participants were recruited from South Korean memory clinics. Plasma GFAP was measured using ultrasensitive Simoa assays. White matter hyperintensity burden was graded using the Fazekas scale and stratified into low (LVP: Fazekas 1) and high (HVP: Fazekas 2-3) cerebrovascular burden groups. Medial temporal gray matter density was assessed using voxel-based morphometry, and hippocampal and amygdalar volumes were derived from T1-weighted MRI adjusted for intracranial volume. Linear regression, interaction, and bootstrap mediation models were used to assess associations among GFAP, brain structure, and cognition. A total of 324 participants were included (LVP n = 203; HVP n = 121; median age 73 years [interquartile range 66-78]; 67.9% female). Compared with LVP, HVP participants were older (75 vs 71 years;  In Aβ-negative cognitively impaired individuals with high cerebrovascular burden, elevated plasma GFAP is associated with medial temporal atrophy and cognitive decline, suggesting GFAP may capture astrocyte-reactivity relevant to vascular cognitive impairment beyond amyloid pathology. These cross-sectional findings require confirmation in longitudinal and ethnically diverse cohorts.
items.summary_ja:
背景：グリア細胞の反応性マーカーである血漿グリア線維酸性タンパク質（GFAP）は、アルツハイマー病など多くの神経変性疾患で上昇するが、β-アミロイド（Aβ）非依存の脳血管病変による神経変性や認知機能低下における役割は不明である。  
方法：韓国の記憶クリニックからAβ PET陰性の認知障害者324名（低血管負荷群203名、高血管負荷群121名）を対象に、超高感度Simoa法で血漿GFAPを測定。白質病変はFazekasスケールで評価し、内側側頭葉の灰白質密度はボクセルベース形態計測法、海馬・扁桃体容積はMRIで算出。線形回帰や媒介分析でGFAP、脳構造、認知機能の関連を検討した。  
結果：高血管負荷群は低血管負荷群より年齢が高く、血漿GFAP値が有意に上昇。高血管負荷群において、GFAPの上昇は内側側頭葉萎縮および認知機能低下と関連した。  
結論：Aβ陰性の認知障害者で血管負荷が高い場合、血漿GFAPは血管性認知障害に関連する星状膠細胞反応を反映し、内側側頭葉の萎縮や認知低下と結びつく可能性が示された。今後、縦断的かつ多様な集団での検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: アミロイド陰性の認知障害者において、血漿GFAP（アストロサイト反応の指標）が高いほど、内側側頭葉の萎縮および認知機能低下と関連することが示された。特に脳血管負荷が高い群で顕著であり、GFAPはアミロイド病理とは独立した血管性認知障害の病態把握に有用と考えられる。今後、縦断的かつ多様な集団での検証が必要である。

items.title: Pearls & Oy-sters: Acute Cerebral Occlusion due to Parosteal Osteosarcoma Embolus.
items.abstract: Tumor embolism is a rare cause of acute ischemic stroke. We present a case of a 46-year-old man with a history of distal femoral amputation 11 years prior due to parosteal osteosarcoma who developed acute onset left-sided weakness. Computed tomography (CT) angiography revealed occlusion of the right middle cerebral artery (MCA). Mechanical thrombectomy achieved recanalization and retrieved a white, gelatinous embolus. Histopathologic examination revealed atypical pleomorphic tumor cells. Immunohistochemistry demonstrated strong positivity for SATB2 and SOX9, positivity for CDK4, and a Ki-67 proliferation index of approximately 10%-20%. Fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH) confirmed amplification of the
items.summary_ja:
背景：腫瘍塞栓は急性虚血性脳卒中の稀な原因である。  
方法：46歳男性が11年前に骨膜性骨肉腫のため大腿遠位切断術を受けた既往を持ち、急に左半身の筋力低下を発症。CT血管造影で右中大脳動脈（MCA）閉塞を認め、機械的血栓回収術を実施した。  
結果：血栓回収により再開通を達成し、白色のゼラチン状塞栓物を摘出。組織病理学的検査で異型多形腫瘍細胞を確認。免疫組織化学ではSATB2およびSOX9に強陽性、CDK4陽性、Ki-67増殖指数は約10～20％であった。FISH検査により遺伝子増幅が確認された。  
結論：骨膜性骨肉腫由来の腫瘍塞栓が急性脳動脈閉塞を引き起こすことが示され、腫瘍既往のある患者の急性脳卒中では腫瘍塞栓の可能性を考慮すべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 骨表面骨肉腫の既往がある46歳男性が急性左片麻痺を発症し、CT血管造影で右中大脳動脈閉塞を認めた。機械的血栓回収術により白色ゼラチン状の塞栓を摘出し、病理検査で腫瘍細胞を確認。免疫組織化学でSATB2、SOX9陽性、CDK4陽性、Ki-67は10～20％であり、FISHにより遺伝子増幅も認められた。腫瘍塞栓による急性脳梗塞の稀な症例報告である。

items.title: Gray Matter Damage and Long-Term Disability, Cognitive Outcome, and Survival in Patients With Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Gray matter (GM) damage is a key determinant of clinical disability in multiple sclerosis (MS), but its relevance to very long-term outcomes remains insufficiently characterized. We assessed associations between baseline and 12-month MRI measures of GM and white matter (WM) damage and long-term outcomes in relapse-onset MS. We conducted a prospective longitudinal single-center cohort study of relapse-onset MS patients enrolled between 1993 and 1998. Participants underwent clinical and 1.5T brain MRI assessments at baseline and after 12 months. MRI measures included T2-lesion and T1-lesion volumes, GM, WM, and thalamic volume fractions, magnetization transfer ratio (MTR) of GM, thalamus, normal-appearing WM, and WM lesions. Escalation to high-efficacy disease-modifying therapies (HE-DMTs) was recorded. Outcomes included Expanded Disability Status Scale (EDSS) worsening, evolution to a more severe disease stage, MS-related death, and cognitive deterioration. Associations were evaluated using LASSO-regularized logistic regression with internal bootstrap validation. Seventy-three relapse-onset MS patients (mean age = 33.0 years; female = 69.9%) were followed for a median of 25.9 years (interquartile range = 18.1-27.1; patients lost during follow-up = 11). EDSS worsening occurred in 79.5% of patients, 72.6% evolved to a more severe disease stage, 24.7% died from MS-related causes, and 39.5% of patients with cognitive data (17/43) experienced cognitive deterioration. EDSS worsening was associated with lower baseline GM fraction (GMF) (standardized-β = -0.561), escalation to HE-DMTs (standardized-β = 0.059), lower baseline thalamic fraction (standardized-β = -0.115), lower baseline normal-appearing WM MTR histogram peak height (standardized-β = -0.010), and greater 12-month decline in GM MTR histogram peak height (standardized-β = -0.115) (area under the curve [AUC] = 0.843, 95% CI 0.744-0.941). Evolution to a more severe disease stage was associated with higher 12-month EDSS score change (standardized-β = 0.167) and lower baseline GMF (standardized-β = -0.151) (AUC = 0.793, 95% CI 0.670-0.916). MS-related death was associated with male sex (standardized-β = 0.063), higher baseline EDSS score (standardized-β = 0.182), lower baseline GMF (standardized-β = -0.304), lower baseline GM MTR histogram peak height (standardized-β = -0.050), and greater 12-month decline in mean thalamic MTR (standardized-β = -0.370) (AUC = 0.887, 95% CI 0.813-0.961). Cognitive deterioration was associated with older baseline age (standardized-β = 0.197), lower baseline brain parenchymal fraction (standardized-β = -0.039), and lower baseline mean GM MTR (standardized-β = -0.376) (AUC = 0.891, 95% CI 0.788-0.994). Brain GM damage showed consistent associations with disability worsening and evolution, mortality, and cognitive deterioration over 26 years in relapse-onset MS, supporting the long-term clinical relevance of GM-focused MRI markers.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）における灰白質（GM）損傷は臨床的障害の重要因子であるが、長期予後との関連は十分に解明されていない。  
方法：1993～1998年に登録された再発型MS患者73名（平均年齢33歳、女性69.9%）を対象に、ベースラインと12か月後のMRI（T2・T1病変量、GM・白質（WM）・視床容積、磁化率転移比（MTR）など）を測定し、約26年間追跡。障害進行（EDSS悪化）、重症化、MS関連死亡、認知機能低下との関連をLASSO正則化ロジスティック回帰で解析した。  
結果：EDSS悪化は79.5%、重症化72.6%、MS関連死24.7%、認知低下は43例中17例で認められた。EDSS悪化は低いベースラインGM容積や視床容積、正常白質MTRの低下、12か月間のGM MTR低下と有意に関連。重症化は12か月のEDSS変化と低いGM容積、MS関連死は男性、初期EDSS高値、低いGM容積・MTR、視床MTR低下と関連。認知低下は高齢、低い脳実質容積とGM MTRと関連した。  
結論：再発型MSにおけるGM損傷は、長期にわたる障害進行、重症化、死亡、認知機能低下と一貫して関連し、GMを中心としたMRI指標の臨床的意義を支持する。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者73名を約26年間追跡し、灰白質（GM）損傷が長期的な障害進行、重症化、死亡率、認知機能低下と強く関連することをMRIで示した。特に、初期のGM量減少や磁化率低下が予後不良の指標となり、GM損傷はMSの長期臨床転帰評価に重要な役割を果たすことが明らかとなった。

items.title: Association Between Postmortem Pathologic Burden and the Rate of Clinical Progression in Patients With Frontotemporal Lobar Degeneration.
items.abstract: Histopathologic staging of Alzheimer disease has led to validation of imaging techniques that guide diagnosis and treatment. We previously constructed preliminary phases of the sequential progression of TDP-43 and tau to guide similar efforts in behavioral-variant frontotemporal dementia (bvFTD). In this article, we expand this work using digital pathology and longitudinal clinical data to more comprehensively model the relationship between clinical progression and the distribution and severity of postmortem frontotemporal lobar degeneration (FTLD) pathology. In this retrospective cohort study, 101 patients (42% female, median age at symptom onset = 63 years) were selected from the Penn Integrated Neurodegenerative Disease Database and had both longitudinal assessments and primary neuropathologic diagnosis of FTLD-Tau or FTLD-TDP. We used validated methods to quantify the burden of primary pathology from up to 6 cortical regions across hemispheres. FTLD-TDP pathologic phase was constructed from diagnostic pathology data based on published criteria. We tested the association between pathologic metrics and (1) disease duration or (2) the rate of clinic progression measured by 2 independent global measures (Clinical Dementia Rating Scale-Sum of Boxes [CDR-SB] and Mini-Mental State Examination [MMSE]). Linear regression and linear mixed-effects models were adjusted for hemisphere sampled, sex, age at onset, pathogenic variant status, and pathologic subtype. Disease duration did not associate with pathologic burden in multiple regression (FTLD-TDP β = 0.01 [-0.06, 0.09];  Greater TDP-43 burden was most closely associated with antemortem clinical decline rather than cumulative aggregation through the disease course. These human data suggest that the temporal dynamics of protein aggregation may differ among FTLD proteinopathies, with implications for the interpretation of FTLD-Tau and FTLD-TDP‑specific biomarkers as these are developed.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病の組織病理学的段階付けは、診断や治療を導く画像診断技術の検証に寄与している。前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）におけるTDP-43およびタウ蛋白の進行段階モデルを構築し、行動変異型前頭側頭型認知症（bvFTD）の臨床進行との関連を検討した。  
方法：ペンシルベニア統合神経変性疾患データベースからFTLD-TauまたはFTLD-TDPと診断された101名（女性42％、発症中央値63歳）を対象に、縦断的臨床評価と死後病理データを用いて、最大6つの皮質領域における病理負荷を定量化。TDP-43病理相を既存基準に基づき構築し、病理指標と（1）疾患期間、（2）臨床進行速度（CDR-SB、MMSE）との関連を多変量回帰および線形混合効果モデルで解析した。  
結果：疾患期間と病理負荷には有意な関連が認められなかった（FTLD-TDP β=0.01 [-0.06, 0.09]）。一方、TDP-43の蓄積量は死前の臨床的悪化と強く関連し、疾患経過中の累積とは異なる動態を示した。  
結論：FTLDにおける蛋白質凝集の時間的進行は蛋白質病理型により異なり、FTLD-TauおよびFTLD-TDP特異的バイオマーカーの解釈や開発に重要な示唆を与える。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、前頭側頭葉変性症（FTLD）患者101名の死後病理学的負荷と臨床進行速度の関連を検討した。TDP-43およびタウ蛋白の蓄積をデジタル病理と縦断的臨床データで解析し、TDP-43負荷が病気の経過よりも臨床的悪化速度と強く関連することを示した。これにより、FTLDの蛋白蓄積動態が異なり、バイオマーカー開発に重要な示唆を与える。

items.title: Multidomain Lifestyle Intervention in Mild Cognitive Impairment: Subgroup Analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET Randomized Trial.
items.abstract: Mild cognitive impairment (MCI) is a high-risk stage for progression to dementia. The SUPERBRAIN-MEET trial previously demonstrated cognitive benefits of a multidomain lifestyle intervention (MLI) delivered through face-to-face sessions and digital platforms. The aim of this study was to examine whether the cognitive effects of the MLI varied according to sociodemographic characteristics, digital readiness, baseline cognitive status, and vascular risk profiles, in a prespecified subgroup analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET randomized controlled trial. SUPERBRAIN-MEET was a 24-week, multicenter, outcome assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized controlled trial conducted across 17 hospitals in South Korea. Adults aged 60-85 years with MCI were randomly assigned (1:1) to the MLI or control group. Subgroups were defined based on sociodemographic factors (sex, age, education, and living status), digital readiness (internet access, frequency of digital device use), cognitive status (MMSE score), and vascular risk profiles (body mass index [BMI], obesity status, smoking status, systolic and diastolic blood pressure, serum total cholesterol, low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, high-density lipoprotein cholesterol, fasting plasma glucose, and cardiovascular comorbidity). The primary outcome was the change in the repeatable battery for the assessment of neuropsychological status (RBANS) total index score from baseline to 24 weeks. Effect modification was assessed using linear mixed-effects models with interaction terms and false discovery rate correction. Of 300 randomized participants, 277 participants (mean age, 72.9 years; 69.3% female) were included in the modified intention-to-treat analysis (142 in the MLI group and 135 in the control group). MLI significantly improved RBANS total index scores compared with control at 24 weeks (between-group difference, 4.17 points; 95% CI 1.92-6.43). No subgroup interactions remained significant after false discovery rate correction, indicating consistent effects across subgroups. In this subgroup analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET trial, the cognitive benefits of MLI were not significantly modified by sociodemographic factors, digital readiness, baseline cognitive status, or vascular risk profiles. These findings should be interpreted with caution, given the exploratory nature of subgroup analyses and limited statistical power. The results support the generalizability and scalability of technology-assisted multidomain lifestyle interventions for dementia prevention in older adults with MCI. The trial was registered at ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05023057; submitted August 20, 2021; first patient enrolled September 3, 2021; URL: clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT05023057).
items.summary_ja:
背景：軽度認知障害（MCI）は認知症への進行リスクが高い状態であり、SUPERBRAIN-MEET試験では多領域生活習慣介入（MLI）が認知機能改善に有効であることが示されている。  
方法：韓国の17病院で60～85歳のMCI患者300名を対象に、24週間のMLI群と対照群に無作為割付けし、性別、年齢、教育歴、デジタル利用状況、認知機能、血管リスク因子などのサブグループごとに認知機能変化（RBANSスコア）を比較した。  
結果：277名の解析で、MLI群は対照群に比べて24週後のRBANS総合スコアが有意に改善（群間差4.17点、95%CI 1.92-6.43）した。サブグループ間で効果の有意な差は認められず、社会人口学的要因やデジタル準備度、認知機能初期状態、血管リスクによらず一貫した効果が示された。  
結論：MLIの認知機能改善効果は多様な背景を持つ高齢MCI患者に広く適用可能であり、テクノロジー支援型の多領域介入の普及・拡大に有用である。ただし、サブグループ解析の探索的性質と統計的検出力の限界を考慮する必要がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 軽度認知障害（MCI）患者を対象としたSUPERBRAIN-MEET試験のサブグループ解析により、多面的生活習慣介入（MLI）は性別、年齢、教育、デジタル利用状況、認知機能、血管リスクに関わらず認知機能を有意に改善した。これにより、MLIの認知改善効果は幅広いMCI高齢者に一般化可能であり、デジタル支援を活用した認知症予防介入の普及が期待される。

items.title: Exploring Between-Study Heterogeneity in Extended-Window IV Thrombolysis for Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Meta-Analysis of 18 Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.abstract: IV thrombolysis (IVT) is the standard-of-care evidence-based treatment of eligible patients with acute ischemic stroke (AIS) within 4.5 hours of symptom onset. Emerging evidence supports its use beyond this time window, leading to expanded recommendations for selected patients presenting between 4.5 and 24 hours. We performed a systematic review and meta-analysis to evaluate IVT in the 4.5- to 24-hour window and to explore sources of between-study heterogeneity. We searched MEDLINE, Cochrane Library, and ClinicalTrials.gov from inception through February 2026. Eligible studies were randomized controlled trials (RCTs) or individual patient-data meta-analyses of RCTs comparing IVT with control in patients with AIS presenting beyond 4.5 hours from last known well. The primary outcome was excellent functional recovery, defined as a modified Rankin Scale (mRS) of 0-1 at 90 days. Secondary outcomes included functional independence (mRS of 0-2 at 90 days); change in mRS disability, quantified as the common odds ratio (OR) for a 1-point improvement across the full ordinal mRS distribution (ordinal analysis); and safety measures such as 90-day mortality and symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (sICH). Risk ratios (RRs) with 95% CIs were pooled. Multivariable meta-regression simultaneously modeled thrombolytic agent, endovascular thrombectomy context, and territory to disentangle confounded predictors. Fifteen studies representing 18 RCTs and encompassing 5,168 patients were included in the primary analysis. Of the 18 included RCTs, 11 required advanced perfusion imaging (CTP or MRP mismatch) or diffusion-weighted imaging/fluid-attenuated inversion recovery mismatch to confirm salvageable tissue; the remaining 7 permitted noncontrast CT/CT angiography-based selection. IVT significantly improved excellent functional outcome at 90 days (mRS 0-1; 40.3% vs 33.2%, RR 1.21; 95% CI 1.13-1.30;  Extended-window IVT improves functional outcomes across a wider spectrum of stroke subgroups than previously recognized. The benefit seems greatest for patients with more severe strokes in settings where thrombectomy is unavailable, providing the evidence base for offering a critical reperfusion strategy for the substantial proportion of patients worldwide who lack timely access to thrombectomy. This study provides American Academy of Neurology Class I evidence that IVT administered 4.5-24 hours after moderate-to-severe AIS onset in patients with salvageable tissue, where thrombectomy is not readily available, improves functional outcome at 90 days without increasing mortality.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）に対する静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）は、発症から4.5時間以内の患者に標準治療として推奨されているが、4.5～24時間の拡大時間窓での有効性については不明点が多い。  
方法：MEDLINEやCochrane Libraryなどを用いて、4.5時間以降にIVTを施行したAIS患者を対象とした18件のランダム化比較試験（RCT）を系統的にレビュー・メタ解析した。主要評価項目は90日後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）0-1の優れた機能回復とし、安全性指標も評価した。  
結果：5,168例を含む解析で、IVT群は対照群に比べて90日後のmRS 0-1の割合が有意に高く（40.3% vs 33.2%、RR 1.21）、機能的独立性の改善も認められた。高度な画像診断を用いた患者選択が多い研究群で効果が顕著であり、血栓回収療法が利用できない中等度から重度の脳卒中患者で特に有効であった。  
結論：4.5～24時間の拡大時間窓においても、救済可能な脳組織を有するAIS患者に対するIVTは、血栓回収療法が利用困難な環境で機能予後を改善し、死亡率を増加させないことがアメリカ神経学会のクラスIエビデンスとして示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本メタ解析は、発症4.5～24時間後の急性虚血性脳卒中患者に対する静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）の効果を18件のRCTで検証した。IVTは90日後の優れた機能回復（mRS 0-1）を有意に改善し、特に血栓回収療法が利用困難な重症例で効果が顕著であった。死亡率増加は認められず、救済可能な脳組織を有する患者に対する拡大時間窓でのIVTの有効性と安全性を示すClass Iエビデンスを提供する。
